title: Winner
rule: Final winner.
prize: Jersey of winning team with winning goalscorer's name on the back

title: 2nd place team
rule: Runner-up.

title: 3rd place team
rule: 3rd-place play-off winner.

title: Top scoring player
rule: Most goals across the tournament.

title: Top scoring team
rule: Most goals scored in the group stage only.

title: Most clean sheets (team)
rule: Most clean sheets across the whole tournament.

title: First red card (by mins played)
rule: Determined by cumulative tournament minutes played at moment of red, so teams playing earlier in the tournament don't benefit.

title: First own goal (by mins played)
rule: Cumulative tournament minutes basis, same logic as the red-card award.

title: Worst team
rule: Lowest points → then worst goal difference → then fewest goals scored.

title: First team to lose on penalties
rule: Knockout-stage penalty shootout loss.

title: Set piece kings
rule: Team with the most non-penalty set-piece goals (direct free kicks, corners, indirect free kicks).

title: Worst disciplined team
rule: Most cards + fouls per 90 (exact weighting to be locked before kickoff).

title: Iran Multiplier
rule: If Iran does not show up to the tournament, the entrant who drew Iran gets a 1.5x multiplier on all rewards earned by their OTHER team, EXCEPT 1st place.
prize: 1.5× modifier on other team's awards (excl. winner)

title: Trump bash award
rule: First team where Trump directly insults their national team — broad insults against the country do NOT count.

title: First missed penalty (by mins played)
rule: Cumulative tournament minutes basis. In-play and shootout misses both count unless decided otherwise before kickoff.

title: Shithouse award
rule: First team to win a match after receiving a red card prior to the 75th minute.

title: First player to cry during the national anthem
rule: First player visibly in tears during the pre-match national anthem.

title: First player to cry after kickoff (sad)
rule: First player to cry during or after a match in a sad/disappointed way. Tears of joy don't count.

title: First child crying in the crowd
rule: First child spotted crying on the broadcast. Award goes to the team whose fans the child is supporting.

title: First hat-trick
rule: First player to score three goals in a single match.
